cases.title: CheckedIn registration transitions to Attended when event completes
preconditions: Event progressed through RegistrationClosed and InProgress with valid check-in window
Participant registration in CheckedIn state with one valid CheckinRecord
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor authorized to complete the event
steps: Invoke eventService.complete(eventId, organizerContext)
Query registration row by registrationId
cases.expected: Registration state is Attended; prior CheckinRecord and checkinAt timestamp remain unchanged; event state is Completed

cases.title: POST complete marks checked-in participant Attended in registrations list
preconditions: E2E fixture event with registered participant checked in via POST /events/{eventId}/checkins
Event in InProgress state
Organizer admin JWT with scope for the event
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/complete with organizer Authorization bearer token
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations?state=Attended&page=1&pageSize=20
cases.expected: Complete returns success; attended list includes the checked-in registrationId with state Attended

cases.title: Self check-in participant is marked Attended after event completion
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Participant completed self check-in within window (registration CheckedIn)
Event InProgress ready for completion
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/self-checkin with participant token during InProgress
POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/complete with organizer token
GET /api/v1/me/registrations for the participant
cases.expected: Participant registration appears with state Attended after completion regardless of staff vs self check-in method

cases.title: markAttendance guard permits CheckedIn to Attended when event is complete
preconditions: Registration state machine guard for markAttendance transition
Registration in CheckedIn state
Event in Completed state (or completion trigger active)
steps: Evaluate markAttendance transition guard with CheckedIn registration and completed event context
cases.expected: Guard returns allowed; transition target is Attended per state machine table

cases.title: Flow A lifecycle completion step finalizes checked-in participant as Attended
preconditions: E2E Flow A progressed through publish, registration, check-in (CheckedIn)
Event InProgress with valid prior check-in recorded
Organizer token from prior flow steps
steps: Execute Flow A event completion step: POST /events/{eventId}/complete
Verify registration state before proceeding to feedback/eligibility steps
cases.expected: Checked-in participant registration is Attended, enabling downstream feedback and eligibility evaluation per workflow D

cases.title: Organizer registrations view shows Attended status after event completion
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin logged in with event scope
Event completed with at least one participant who checked in during the window
Organizer registrations or attendance management page available
steps: Navigate to organizer event registrations or attendance list for the completed event
Locate participant who had valid check-in before completion
Observe displayed registration state badge or column
cases.expected: UI shows Attended status for the checked-in participant; state reflects post-completion finalization without manual refresh beyond normal client update

cases.title: Participant my registrations shows Attended after event completion
preconditions: Participant logged in who self or staff checked in before event ended
Event has been completed by organizer
Participant my registrations page available
steps: Navigate to participant my registrations list
Find the completed event registration row
cases.expected: Registration row displays Attended terminal state for the event where participant had valid check-in

cases.title: Registered participant without valid check-in is marked Absent not Attended on completion
preconditions: Event with at least two Registered participants
Only one participant has valid CheckinRecord (CheckedIn); other remains Registered
Event ready for completion
steps: Complete event via eventService.complete
Query both registration states
cases.expected: Checked-in participant is Attended; participant without valid check-in is Absent; BR-12 attendance inference is correct for both outcomes

cases.title: Mixed cohort attendance finalization assigns Attended and Absent correctly
preconditions: Single event with multiple Registered participants
Subset checked in within window; remainder never checked in
No waitlisted or cancelled registrations in the cohort under test
steps: Record in-window check-ins for subset only
Complete event
List all registrations for the event and group by terminal state
cases.expected: Every CheckedIn registration becomes Attended; every Registered-without-check-in becomes Absent; no registration remains CheckedIn or Registered after completion

cases.title: Waitlisted registration is not marked Attended on event completion
preconditions: Event at capacity with waitlist enabled
Participant registration in Waitlisted state (never promoted to Registered)
Event progressed to completion
steps: Complete event
Query waitlisted participant registration state
cases.expected: Waitlisted registration does not transition to Attended; terminal state follows waitlist/expiry policy (e.g. Expired or unchanged non-attendance outcome), preserving AC-07 scope to valid check-in holders only

cases.title: CheckedIn registration cannot transition to Attended before event completion
preconditions: Event InProgress with participant in CheckedIn state
No direct markAttendance API exposed outside completion workflow
steps: Attempt to set or transition registration to Attended while event remains InProgress
Inspect registration state
cases.expected: Transition rejected or unavailable; registration remains CheckedIn until event completion triggers markAttendance

cases.title: Repeated POST complete is idempotent for already Attended registrations
preconditions: Event already Completed with checked-in participant in Attended state
Organizer admin JWT
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/complete again (or verify second completion attempt)
GET registration state for the attended participant
cases.expected: Registration remains Attended; no duplicate attendance side effects; invalid re-completion returns 409 or equivalent without corrupting Attended state

cases.title: Cancelled registration is not marked Attended on event completion
preconditions: Participant had Registered then CancelledByUser before check-in
Another participant checked in for contrast
Event completes normally
steps: Complete event
Query cancelled registration state
cases.expected: Cancelled registration remains in cancelled terminal state; only CheckedIn registrations become Attended

cases.title: Attendance finalization for all registrations commits atomically with event completion
preconditions: Multiple CheckedIn and Registered participants on same event
Database transaction boundary for event completion and attendance reconciliation per module breakdown
steps: Complete event in single operation
Query event state and all affected registration states in same database session
cases.expected: Event is Completed and all registrations have consistent terminal attendance states (Attended or Absent); no partial finalization where event is Completed but some CheckedIn rows remain unchecked

cases.title: Attendance finalization is deterministic for identical fixtures
preconditions: Fixed clock and seeded fixture IDs per testing plan deterministic controls
Same CheckedIn cohort and completion trigger across repeated test runs
steps: Run attendance finalization scenario twice with identical inputs
Compare registration terminal states
cases.expected: Both runs produce identical Attended/Absent assignments; no flakiness from ordering or timing

cases.title: GET attendance list reflects Attended participants after event completion
preconditions: Event completed after in-window check-ins
Organizer staff JWT with attendance read scope
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/attendance?page=1&pageSize=20 after completion
Cross-reference rows with registrations filtered by state=Attended
cases.expected: Attendance list includes checked-in participants with checkinAt preserved; corresponding registrations show Attended state in paginated registrations endpoint

cases.title: Attended status satisfies downstream certificate eligibility attendance prerequisite
preconditions: Event completed with checked-in participant marked Attended
Feedback not yet submitted; eligibility evaluation available post-completion
steps: Complete event and confirm Attended state
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/me for the attended participant (or trigger evaluation)
cases.expected: Eligibility evaluation does not fail attendance rule solely due to missing Attended status; Attended registration satisfies BR-17 minimum attendance condition (other rules may still yield NotEligible)

cases.title: CheckedIn to Attended transition is traceable in registration status history
preconditions: Participant checked in and event completed
Status history endpoint enabled for the event
steps: Complete event after check-in
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/status-history?registrationId={registrationId}
cases.expected: History includes CheckedIn to Attended transition with timestamp and trigger context (event completion), supporting operational traceability
